name: Valid Accounts (passwd-file enumeration)
description: Initial Access / TA0001 (also Persistence / Privilege Escalation / Defense Evasion — Valid Accounts is cross-tactic). Read /etc/passwd and list users with login shells (proxy for accounts available for valid-credential reuse). Read-only — no credential acquisition, no login attempts. Captures the surface an attacker would enumerate post-foothold to decide which valid accounts to target.
